# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next';

async function createReadableStream(body: ReadableStream) {
  return new Response(body, {
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/octet-stream',
    },
  });
}

const handler = async (req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) => {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return res.status(405).json({ error: 'Method not allowed' });
  }

  const readableStreamBody = req.body as ReadableStream;

  try {
    const streamedResponse = await createReadableStream(readableStreamBody);
    res.writeHead(200, streamedResponse.headers);
    streamedResponse.body.pipe(res);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });
  }
};

export default handler;
